spans.content: · Most RL methods assume an episodic setting
where resets to the initial state are readily
available at the end of each episode.

· However,a truly autonomous agent should be
able to learn from scratch without external
We propose a demonstration-free ARL algorithm
that consists of a conditionally activated
auxiliary agent and a bidirectional goal
· To the best of our knowledge, IBC is the first
non-episodic RL that can consistently learn
without manual resets and demonstrations by
of theNineteenth InternationalConference on Machine Learning.2002.
